name: Native Interactions Framework
summary: Framework that allows for the placement of interactions such as sitting, sleeping, drinking, showering and more.
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/x9zdRpE.gif[/img]

[b][color=#00ff00][size=4][u]What is Native Interactions Framework:[/u][/size][/color][u][color=#00ff00][size=4]
[/size][/color][/u][/b]
[list]
[*]Native Interactions Framework (NIF) allows modders to easily place supported interactions in the game world
[*]No need to edit files or scenes by hand, everything is done through an in-game UI
[*]Offers 21 unique interactions
[*]Also offers interactions which interact with the environment, such as sitting and controlling the TV
[*]Creations can [url=https://wiki.redmodding.org/cyberpunk-2077-modding/modding-guides/world-editing/native-interactions-framework/getting-started#sharing-creations]easily be shared[/url] and be made part of your mod
[/list][b][color=#00ffff][size=4][u]Features:

[/u][/size][/color][/b][list]
[*]In-Game UI for placing and editing the interactions
[*]World Builder placement helpers for interactions with props
[*]21 unique interactions:
[*]Wardrobe
[*]Couch sitting (With TV Controls)
[*]Tea Drinking
[*]Bed
[*]Shower
[*]Coffee Drinking
[*]Bar Sitting (With drinking and smoking)
[*]Incense burning
[*]Guitar Playing
[*]Mirror (Change appearance and facial expressions)
[*]Billiard
[*]Meditation
[*]Dancing
[*]Chair sitting
[*]Leaning (With smoking)
[*]Netrunner Chair sitting
[*]Iguana Petting
[*]Yakitori Skewer Eating
[*]Basketball throwing
[*]Apartment purchasing
[*]Appearance changing
[*]Teleport
[/list]
[color=#00ff00][size=4][b][u]Documentations:
[/u][/b][/size][/color]
[url=https://wiki.redmodding.org/cyberpunk-2077-modding/modding-guides/world-editing/native-interactions-framework][size=5]> Documentations and Guides <[/size][/url][size=5]
